title: uva aurita
intro: Uva aurita, also known as the bearberry or kinnikinnick, is a low-growing, evergreen shrub native to North America. The plant's medicinal properties include its ability to be used as a diuretic and its antiseptic properties, which help to prevent the growth of bacteria and fungi. The health benefits of uva aurita include its potential to help manage urinary tract infections, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of uva aurita typically involve drying the leaves and using them to make teas, tinctures, or infusions, which can be consumed orally to harness the plant's medicinal properties.
